base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of m_bison — a character (final_boss) from 1991 street fighter ii. M. Bison/Vega — final boss Shadoloo leader. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: M. Bison/Vega — final boss Shadoloo leader; Psycho Crusher + Scissor Kick
